---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new POC capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Objective
What problem does this feature solve?

## Requirement
Requirement ID from `docs/requirements.md`, or explain why this is exploratory.

## Scope
- [ ] In scope
- [ ] Out of scope

## Team / Area
- [ ] Team A: Platform + Observability
- [ ] Team B: Lakehouse Core + Data Engineering
- [ ] Team C: Orchestration + BI
- [ ] Team D: AI + Ingestion UX
- [ ] Exploratory / unclear

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Documented
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Does not break baseline POC
- [ ] Includes sample command or screenshot
- [ ] Links to related docs, issue, or Project Board item

## Test Command
```bash
make smoke
```

## References
Add relevant documentation links.
